executives.name: Jim Gallagher
executives.background: Mr. Gallagher is a Professional Mining Engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of North American Palladium and has held senior operational roles at Falconbridge and Xstrata.

executives.name: Mike Garbutt
executives.background: Mr. Garbutt is a Professional Engineer with over 25 years of experience in mining operations and project management. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer at Harte Gold and held senior roles at Glencore.

executives.name: Kris Raffle
executives.background: Mr. Raffle is a Professional Geologist and a Principal of APEX Geoscience Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in mineral exploration and project management.

executives.name: Sandi Munroe
executives.background: Ms. Munroe is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in financial management and corporate governance in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Jim Gallagher
board_of_directors.background: Professional Mining Engineer with over 35 years of experience. Former CEO of North American Palladium.

board_of_directors.name: Dean Chambers
board_of_directors.background: Professional Engineer and financial executive with over 35 years of experience. Former CFO of Sherritt International Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Ewan Downie
board_of_directors.background: Experienced mining executive and founder of several successful exploration companies, including Wolfden Resources and Premier Gold Mines.

board_of_directors.name: Maryann Mihychuk
board_of_directors.background: Geoscientist and former Canadian Member of Parliament and Minister of Natural Resources. Extensive experience in mineral policy and indigenous relations.

board_of_directors.name: Shimi Shah
board_of_directors.background: Venture capitalist and entrepreneur with over 20 years of experience in investing and corporate finance across various sectors.

sources.source_description: Clean Air Metals Official Website - Management and Directors Page
